mapper.insert: INSERT INTO custom_sections (resume_id, section_title, content, sort_order) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{sectionTitle}, #{content}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM custom_sections WHERE id = #{id} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, resume_id, section_title, content, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM custom_sections WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT id FROM custom_sections WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId}
